last_result: The frozen cvrp_expert_router_proxy_v1 cohort completed 3/3 valid paired coordinates with opencode-go and no invalid outputs, missing coordinates, or infeasible confirmation runs. It failed its pre-registered gate because all three generated routers used only one expert each (runs_using_at_least_two_experts=0, required>=2), despite +0.393816% mean confirmation improvement and +0.323015% worst environment degradation within the safety bound. The result is a valid negative result; retain the oracle as an upper bound and switch to reevo_reflection_memory.
